mapper.select:
SELECT A.APPLY_NO, A.PERSON_ID, E.EMPID, E.LOCAL_NAME, E.DEPTNO AS DEPT_NO, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_TO_TIME, A.LEAVE_REASON, A.LEAVE_TYPE_NO, A.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, A.APPLY_LENGTH, GET_VAC_COUNT(A.PERSON_ID, A.CPNY_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS ANNUAL_LEAVE_COUNT, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, GET_DEPT_NAME(E.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, A.AFFIRM_FLAG, A.CREATED_BY, A.CREATED_IP, TO_CHAR(A.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, A.UPDATED_BY, A.UPDATED_IP, ( SELECT LISTAGG('

' || S.AFFIRM_LEVEL || '. ' || NVL(HE.EMPID, '') || ' - ' || NVL(HE.LOCAL_NAME, '') || '

', '') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.AFFIRM_LEVEL) FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL S LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON S.AFFIRM_PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID WHERE S.APPLY_NO = TO_CHAR(A.APPLY_NO) AND S.AFFIRM_LEVEL > 0 ) AS AFFIRM_STR FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON E.PERSON_ID = A.PERSON_ID WHERE A.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND UPPER(E.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' AND UPPER(E.LOCAL_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{localName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' AND A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME < TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 ORDER BY A.CREATE_DATE DESC, E.EMPID

SELECT HE.EMPID, HE.LOCAL_NAME, HE.PERSON_ID, HE.DEPTNO AS DEPT_NO, HE.CPNY_ID, HE.POST_GRADE_NO, ESS.APPLY_NO, ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS LEAVE_TYPE_NAME, TO_CHAR(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(ESS.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_TO_TIME, ESS.APPLY_LENGTH, AR_GET_DAY_HOURS(HE.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AS DAY_HOURS, ESS.LEAVE_REASON, ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HE.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, TO_CHAR(ESS.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, ESS.DETAIL_TYPE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.DETAIL_TYPE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DETAIL_TYPE_NAME, ESS.ACTIVITY, ESS.CONFIRM_FLAG FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB ESS INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON ESS.PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(ESS.APPLY_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ESS.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPTNAME, ESS.EMPID, ESS.APPLY_NAME, ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS LEAVE_TYPE_NAME, ESS.LEAVE_FROM_DATE, ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, ESS.LEAVE_TO_DATE, ESS.LEAVE_TO_TIME, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_DATE, '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LEAVE_TO_DATE, '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, '^[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LEAVE_TO_TIME, '^[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$') THEN GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH( GET_EMP_PERSONID(ESS.EMPID, ESS.CPNY_ID), ESS.CPNY_ID, COMPOSE_DATE(TO_DATE(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME), COMPOSE_DATE(TO_DATE(ESS.LEAVE_TO_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ESS.LEAVE_TO_TIME), ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE ) ELSE NULL END AS APPLY_LENGTH, ESS.LEAVE_REASON, ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, ESS.UPLOAD_BY, TO_CHAR(ESS.UPLOAD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPLOAD_DATE, ESS.CPNY_ID, ESS.LINE_ID, ESS.UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG, ESS.RESULT_FLAG FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB_EXCEL_TEMP ESS INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON ESS.EMPID = HE.EMPID AND ESS.CPNY_ID = HE.CPNY_ID WHERE ESS.UPLOAD_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND NVL(TRIM(ESS.UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG), '') <> ''
AND NVL(TRIM(ESS.UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG), '') = ''
ORDER BY CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LINE_ID, '^[0-9]+$') THEN TO_NUMBER(ESS.LINE_ID) ELSE 99999999 END, ESS.LINE_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB ( APPLY_NO, PERSON_ID, APPLY_TIME, LEAVE_FROM_TIME, LEAVE_TO_TIME, LEAVE_REASON, LEAVE_TYPE_NO, LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, APPLY_LENGTH, AFFIRM_FLAG, CONFIRM_FLAG, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), #{leaveReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '21', #{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), GET_CODE_NO(#{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '21', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'CODE') ), '14014306', 0, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB SET PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLY_TIME = SYSDATE, LEAVE_FROM_TIME = TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), LEAVE_TO_TIME = TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), LEAVE_REASON = #{leaveReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LEAVE_TYPE_CODE = #{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLY_LENGTH = GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), GET_CODE_NO(#{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '21', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'CODE') ), AFFIRM_FLAG = '14014306', ACTIVITY = 1, CONFIRM_FLAG = 0, CONFIRM_DATE = NULL, CONFIRM_BY = NULL, CONFIRM_IP = NULL, CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM AR_APPLY_RESULT WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
